headline: China Southern strikes landmark deal for Boeing cargo jets
summary: China Southern Airlines became the first mainland Chinese carrier to buy from Boeing in years with an order Friday for seven freighter aircraft. The post China Southern strikes landmark deal for Boeing cargo jets appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Boeing (BA) Wins $2B MUOS Satellite Contract
summary: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 24, 2026, The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) was awarded a maximum $2B fixed-price-incentive-firm-target contract for Phase II of the Mobile User Objective System service life extension effort. Boeing will design, develop, build, and provide launch and on-orbit […]
